name: Reincarnation in Another World
short_description: "Reincarnation in Another World" is a roguelite game where you will have traditional barrage and different skills to fight against hordes of monsters. Choose from a variety of traits and power-ups to create a unique build and style to complete the game.
detailed_description:
One day, you suddenly appear in a different world, and all kinds of unknown monsters appear before your eyes. You have to find a way to return to the world that originally belonged to you.

Game Features

✧ Traditional barrage: You can improve your barrage shooting ability through a variety of weapons/equipment

✧ Possess RPG-style skills: You will have multiple skills in the game, and you can use skills to perform various displacements, instant transfers, or increase damage

✧ There are 5 difficulty and 30 levels

✧ Multiple monsters: There are multiple monsters in each level, and the monsters have multiple different attack modes

✧ There is a boss level: Only by defeating the boss can you pass the game

✧ Ability change: You can get different professions in the game. Choosing different professions can greatly change your attack coefficient and find the style that suits you best

✧ Talent system: Every time you complete a level, you will get points. Use points to improve your talents and make you stronger
